name: Full Olist Raw Ingestion
description: Load all Olist source CSV files into Postgres raw schema using deterministic batch ingestion.
acceptance_criteria: All required CSV files are loaded into raw.* tables
Ingestion fails fast when a required source file is missing
Ingestion process is repeatable and recreates raw tables

name: Staging Data Standardization
description: Cast and normalize raw text columns into typed staging models with clean naming and null handling.
acceptance_criteria: staging schema contains typed entities for orders/customers/products/payments/reviews
translation mapping is applied to product categories
invalid empty-string timestamps are converted to null

name: KPI-Ready Mart Models
description: Build marts for order, payment, delivery, and category sales analytics.
acceptance_criteria: marts.fct_orders and marts.kpi_overview are generated successfully
monthly KPI and delivery performance tables are available
dbt relationship tests pass on key PK/FK links

name: Serving Layer for Trusted Access
description: Expose serving views optimized for API and agent consumption.
acceptance_criteria: serving.kpi_overview exists
serving.kpi_monthly_sales exists
serving.fct_sales_by_category exists

name: Required Analytics API
description: Provide FastAPI endpoints for query_data, search_schema, get_business_definition, get_kpi_summary, run_agent_workflow.
acceptance_criteria: All required endpoints return schema-valid responses
API key auth is enforced via X-API-Key header
Unsafe SQL requests are rejected with clear error messages

name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: Implement Supervisor routing across SQL, Retrieval/Schema, and Insight agents using LangGraph.
acceptance_criteria: Intent classification routes to expected agent/tool
Workflow works without external LLM key
Optional LLM summarization activates when API key is provided

name: Read-Only SQL Guardrails
description: Enforce SQL safety: allow SELECT/CTE only, no DDL/DML, bounded LIMIT, statement timeout.
acceptance_criteria: DML/DDL queries are blocked
Queries are auto-limited or limit-capped
Statement timeout is applied for query execution

name: Airflow Orchestration DAG
description: Provide an Airflow DAG that orchestrates full batch pipeline from ingestion through serving validation.
acceptance_criteria: DAG olist_end_to_end_pipeline is discoverable
Task chain ingest -> dbt run -> dbt test -> serving validation works
Pipeline failure and retries are visible in Airflow

name: Local Docker Runtime
description: Run Postgres, API, and Airflow components with Docker Compose for team onboarding.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up starts all required services
Postgres init script creates required schemas
API and Airflow are reachable on local ports

name: Automated Test Baseline
description: Unit and integration tests for SQL safety, router behavior, API contracts, and runtime artifact checks.
acceptance_criteria: Pytest suite runs locally
Critical guardrail and API contract tests exist
Smoke-level e2e file checks are included
